Add program_enrollment_with_user_report (#1914)

	•	Extend marts__combined_program_enrollment_detail with enriched user and program data
	•	Join user demographic fields from marts__combined__users (education, industry, company, etc.)
	•	Join program course and enrollment models to derive courses_taken_in_program

	•	capstone_ind based on course title
	•	program_complete_days from first verified course run start to certificate date
	•	Ensure consistent logic for verified enrollments across metrics (courses_taken_in_program, capstone_sum, first_courserun_start_on_date)
	•	Fix multiple data integrity issues:
	•	Correct join grain and aggregation in courses_detail CTE
	•	Resolve NULL join issues and prevent row multiplication
	•	Add platform to course joins to avoid cross-platform collisions
	•	Align join keys with original Superset logic to ensure accurate aggregation and completion metrics
	•	Improve robustness with explicit column selection, COALESCE handling, and NULL-safe joins
	•	Add comprehensive documentation and tests in _reporting__models.yml
	•	Implement conditional uniqueness tests matching upstream marts__combined_program_enrollment_detail grain, including special handling for edX.org re-enrollment behavior
	•	Address multiple PR review comments and Sentry feedback related to joins, NULL handling, aggregation correctness, and test coverage

commit.message:
fix(db): set uor=0 for deprecated care_team layout fields (#10849)

Fresh installs show deprecated `care_team_provider`, `care_team_status`,
and `care_team_facility` DEM layout fields as visible (`uor=1`), while
the 7.0.3→7.0.4 upgrade script correctly hides them (`uor=0`). This
inconsistency means fresh installs and upgraded installs behave
differently for fields that have been superseded by the
`care_team_member` table. Additionally, users who installed fresh on
8.0.0 will have these fields set incorrectly and need a remediation path
via the upgrade script.

## Changes

- **`sql/database.sql`**: Set `uor=0` on the three deprecated
`care_team_*` `layout_options` INSERT statements, aligning fresh
installs with the state produced by the upgrade path. Incremented the
`v_database` marker to 535.
- **`version.php`**: Incremented `$v_database` from 534 to 535 to stay
in sync with the `database.sql` marker.
- **`sql/8_0_0-to-8_0_1_upgrade.sql`**: Added a `#IfRow3D`-guarded
UPDATE to set `uor=0` for the three deprecated `care_team_*` fields,
ensuring users who installed fresh on 8.0.0 (and thus have `uor=1`) are
corrected when upgrading to 8.0.1.

```sql
-- Before (database.sql)
VALUES ('DEM', 'care_team_provider', ..., 1, ...)
VALUES ('DEM', 'care_team_status',   ..., 1, ...)
VALUES ('DEM', 'care_team_facility', ..., 1, ...)

-- After (database.sql)
VALUES ('DEM', 'care_team_provider', ..., 0, ...)
VALUES ('DEM', 'care_team_status',   ..., 0, ...)
VALUES ('DEM', 'care_team_facility', ..., 0, ...)

-- Added to 8_0_0-to-8_0_1_upgrade.sql
UPDATE `layout_options` SET `uor` = 0
  WHERE `form_id` = 'DEM'
  AND `field_id` IN ('care_team_facility', 'care_team_provider', 'care_team_status')
  AND `uor` = 1;
```

commit.message:
transport: implement IOUSBHost file transfer (getObject/sendObject) (#491)

Upgrade executeStreamingCommand in IOUSBHostLink to support large file
transfers through chunked bulk I/O:

- Data-in: parse PTP data container header to determine total payload
  length, then loop reading bulk-in chunks until complete. Handles the
  0xFFFFFFFF sentinel for files >4GB and early response containers.

- Data-out: send PTP data container header first, then stream payload
  in 64KB chunks from the callback instead of accumulating in memory.
  Uses 0xFFFFFFFF sentinel for containers exceeding UInt32 capacity.

These changes enable getObject, sendObject, getPartialObject, and
sendPartialObject to work through the existing ProtoTransfer layer
which dispatches via executeStreamingCommand.

Add comprehensive PTP container framing tests covering:
- Data-in header parsing and multi-chunk reassembly
- Large file sentinel value handling (0xFFFFFFFF)
- Data-out container encoding
- GetObject/SendObjectInfo/SendObject command framing
- GetPartialObject/GetPartialObject64/SendPartialObject param encoding
- Response container parsing with error codes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
ci: TSAN local validation and status documentation (#489)

Document Thread Sanitizer (TSAN) status on macOS 26 vs macOS 15.
TSAN is blocked on macOS 26.3 (Xcode 26.3) due to platform security
policy rejecting sanitizer runtime code signatures. All workarounds
(TSAN_OPTIONS, DYLD_INSERT_LIBRARIES) fail at the OS level.

Adds Docs/TSANStatus.md covering:
- macOS 26 failure details and root cause
- CI configuration (macOS 15 runners with direct binary execution)
- TSAN test target scope and rationale
- Local run instructions for both platforms
- Known limitations and recommended alternatives

commit.message:
Forms: Add embed code panel to form editor (#47238)

* Forms: Add embed code panel to form editor

Add a document inspector panel to the form editor that allows users
to copy the embed code for embedding forms in posts and pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add CopyCodeRow and embed code rows

Introduce a reusable CopyCodeRow component (with styles) to display a code snippet and a copy button with confirmation. Replace the old inline copy button in the embed panel with PluginPostStatusInfo rows that show both the embed HTML and the shortcode, each using CopyCodeRow. Files added: copy-code-row.tsx, copy-code-row.scss; modified: embed-code-panel.tsx to use CopyCodeRow, to generate embedCode and shortcode, and to switch from PluginDocumentSettingPanel to PluginPostStatusInfo.

* fix import order

* Forms: Address PR review feedback for embed code panel

- Fix plugin name to follow jetpack-form-* convention
- Fix inaccurate docblock and comment text
- Add shortcode copy button alongside embed code
- Replace per-button margin with flex gap layout
- Add unit tests for EmbedCodePanel component
- Fix changelog trailing period

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix prettier formatting in embed code panel test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace tooltip with visible label in CopyCodeRow

Add a label prop that renders above the code snippet, replacing the
tooltip wrapper for better discoverability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Select all text on click in CopyCodeRow

Clicking the code text now selects its full content, making it easier
to copy manually. Adds cursor: text and user-select: all CSS, plus
keyboard accessibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Increase spacing between embed code rows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix Popover placement for RTL locales

Use top-end/top-start placement based on text direction so the
"Copied!" confirmation appears correctly in RTL languages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix docblock to clarify post-type scoping

The component itself doesn't check post type; registration logic in
form-editor/index.tsx handles that.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address Copilot review feedback for CopyCodeRow

- Use ownerDocument.createRange() instead of global document
- Add preventDefault/stopPropagation in keyboard handler
- Add aria-readonly to the textbox span
- Make copy button label describe the action (e.g. "Copy embed code")

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move Copy %s translation into variable

Extract the translatable string "Copy %s" into a buttonLabel constant and add a translator comment. The Button now uses sprintf(buttonLabel, label.toLowerCase()) instead of calling __() inline, improving clarity and ensuring a single translation entry.

* update test

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* minor fixes

commit.message:
Replace broken PhaseOfTheMoonToday API with U.S. Naval Observatory

The PhaseOfTheMoonToday.com API was unreachable, causing silent fallback
to inaccurate local calculation. Now uses the USNO Astronomical
Applications API (aa.usno.navy.mil) which provides exact phase
transition dates.

- Fetch year's phase data from USNO, cached per year
- Compute current phase name by interpolating between transitions
- Calculate illumination % using cosine curve
- Keep MoonPhaseCalculator as offline fallback

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix renderSignIn crash when providers not yet initialised

The fast-path isSignedIn() check added in the previous commit called
getAuth() before providers were set (new user, cleared storage, or no
persisted provider type). getAuth() threw 'Auth provider not initialised',
which boot()'s catch handler displayed as an unrecoverable 'Authentication
error' screen.

Fix: guard with hasProviders() before calling isSignedIn().

Phase 1 - Foundation:
  - lib/protocol.js: CCG_DONE v2 protocol (reqId-based, anti-crosstalk)
  - lib/terminal.js: tmux abstraction (pure command builders + TmuxBackend)
  - lib/registry.js: pane registry with 7-day TTL
  - lib/project_id.js: project ID via SHA256 hash
  - lib/lock.js: PID file-based mutex
  - lib/start_config.js: .ccg/ccg.config reader (CSV + JSON)

Phase 2 - Daemon Architecture:
  - lib/daemon/server.js: TCP daemon (echo/tmux dual mode)
  - lib/daemon/client.js: daemon client (ping/ask)
  - lib/daemon/worker.js: serial task queue (per-session)
  - lib/daemon/session.js: CCG_DONE polling + reply extraction

Phase 3 - One-click start:
  - bin/ccg-cmd.js: v2 subcommand entry (start/ask/ping/status/new/ctx-transfer)

Phase 4 - Memory/Context Transfer:

  - lib/memory/deduper.js: message deduplication
  - lib/memory/transfer.js: context migration orchestrator

Phase 5-6 - Tools + Completion Hook:

fix(safety): quarantine fabricated PIDs from active dispatch (#65)

* fix(safety): quarantine fabricated PIDs from active dispatch

Remove fabricated/speculative PIDs from device dispatch paths:

- OpenFFBoard 0xFFB1: not registered on pid.codes (HTTP 404), absent
  from firmware repository (GitHub code search: 0 results), not in
  linux-steering-wheels. Completely fabricated.

- VRS 0xA356 (DFP V2), 0xA357 (Pedals V1), 0xA358 (Pedals V2),
  0xA359 (Handbrake), 0xA35A (Shifter): sequential guesses with zero
  external evidence. VRS uses non-sequential PIDs (DFP=0xA355,
  Pedals=0xA3BE, R295=0xA44C), strongly undermining the assumption.
  Not found in Linux kernel hid-ids.h, linux-steering-wheels,
  simracing-hwdb, or any other external source.

Constants retained in protocol crates for documentation/reference.
Dispatch tables, capability resolution, and tests updated.

Evidence sources checked:
- pid.codes registry
- OpenFFBoard firmware (Ultrawipf/OpenFFBoard)
- Linux kernel hid-ids.h (mainline)
- JacKeTUs/linux-steering-wheels compatibility table
- JacKeTUs/simracing-hwdb device database

commit.message:
fix: correct originalPrompt parameter in reflect loop exit drain (#281)

Follow-up to #275. The exit drain in `SendViaOrchestratorReflectAsync`
passes `originalPrompt: prompt` (the outer loop prompt) instead of
`originalPrompt: leftover` (the actual message being sent). This causes
the response to be misattributed in chat history — the user sees their
queued message associated with the wrong original input.

One-line fix identified in Round 6 review (R6-N1).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: isolate PromptLibraryService from real filesystem in tests (#277)

Follow-up to #272.

Fixes a test isolation gap where `PromptLibraryService` could read/write
the real `~/.polypilot/prompts/` directory during tests, and a parallel
race between `PromptCommandTests` and `PromptLibraryTests` causing flaky
failures.

**Changes:**
- Add `PromptLibraryService.SetUserPromptsDirForTesting()` to
`TestSetup` module initializer so tests always start with an isolated
temp dir (matches the pattern for `CopilotService` and `RepoManager`)
- Add `[Collection("PromptLibrary")]` to both `PromptCommandTests` and
`PromptLibraryTests` to prevent parallel mutation of the process-global
`_userPromptsDir` static field
- Add `PromptLibraryCollection.cs` with the `[CollectionDefinition]`

Without this fix, tests that access
`PromptLibraryService.UserPromptsDir` before an explicit
`SetUserPromptsDirForTesting` call resolve to the real filesystem path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
